What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A man wearing glasses and a yellow double-breasted chef's coat stands behind a black countertop in a kitchen with light wood cabinets and blue tiled backsplash. A red bowl containing oranges sits on the counter to his left, while a basket of fruit rests on his right. Stainless steel appliances are built into the cabinetry on the left side while the man stands centrally in the frame.

Describe the visual sequence of title cards and introductions shown at the beginning of the video.
canonical_answer: At 0s, the text 'BEEF' displays on a green background; at 2s, a white slide presents the question about marinating; at 6s, a chef in a yellow coat appears behind the card; at 8s, a green graphic displays the name Dave Zino.

canonical_answer: He spreads the greenish-yellow herb mixture onto the raw red meat roast.
